channel.title: unmask.tools — Institutional Double-Speak Wire
channel.description: Autonomous linguistic audit tracking technocratic evasion and structural violence codes. Every item is a phrase verified by human reviewers to abstract physical harm.

item.title: CRITICAL VIOLATION: "shock and awe"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “shock and awe”

Physical reality: Overwhelming lethal bombardment of physical infrastructure and human bodies to cause psychological paralysis

Legal anchor: Geneva Convention AP I, Art. 51 — Prohibition of Terror Against Civilians

Severity: CRITICAL VIOLATION · Confidence: 96% · Language: EN · Confirmed 58 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: CRITICAL VIOLATION: "population transfer"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “population transfer”

Physical reality: Forced displacement of physical human beings from their homes and land

Legal anchor: Rome Statute Art. 7 — Crimes Against Humanity / UDHR Art. 13

Severity: CRITICAL VIOLATION · Confidence: 95% · Language: EN · Confirmed 44 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: CRITICAL VIOLATION: "enhanced interrogation techniques"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “enhanced interrogation techniques”

Physical reality: Torture methods applied to physical human bodies

Legal anchor: Geneva Convention III, Art. 17 / Rome Statute Art. 7

Severity: CRITICAL VIOLATION · Confidence: 97% · Language: EN · Confirmed 63 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: CRITICAL VIOLATION: "collateral damage"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “collateral damage”

Physical reality: Civilian casualties — physical bodies of non-combatants killed or wounded

Legal anchor: Geneva Convention AP I, Art. 51 — Protection of the Civilian Population

Severity: CRITICAL VIOLATION · Confidence: 94% · Language: EN · Confirmed 47 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: CRITICAL VIOLATION: "austerity measures"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “austerity measures”

Physical reality: Cuts to public services affecting the physical survival conditions of the poorest — food, housing, healthcare

Legal anchor: UDHR Art. 25 — Right to Adequate Standard of Living

Severity: CRITICAL VIOLATION · Confidence: 93% · Language: EN · Confirmed 51 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: HIGH CONCERN: "workforce reduction"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “workforce reduction”

Physical reality: Mass termination of employment contracts — physical persons losing income and livelihood

Legal anchor: UDHR Art. 23 — Right to Work

Severity: HIGH CONCERN · Confidence: 92% · Language: EN · Confirmed 54 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: CRITICAL VIOLATION: "surgical strike"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “surgical strike”

Physical reality: Targeted physical destruction — killing or demolition framed as precise

Legal anchor: Geneva Convention AP I, Art. 51 — Principle of Distinction

Severity: CRITICAL VIOLATION · Confidence: 91% · Language: EN · Confirmed 38 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: HIGH CONCERN: "rightsizing"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “rightsizing”

Physical reality: Planned mass layoffs reframed as structural optimisation

Legal anchor: UDHR Art. 23 — Right to Work

Severity: HIGH CONCERN · Confidence: 90% · Language: EN · Confirmed 41 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: CRITICAL VIOLATION: "kinetic action"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “kinetic action”

Physical reality: Physical military force — killing and destruction

Legal anchor: Geneva Conventions / Rome Statute

Severity: CRITICAL VIOLATION · Confidence: 89% · Language: EN · Confirmed 31 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: CRITICAL VIOLATION: "humanitarian intervention"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “humanitarian intervention”

Physical reality: Military force justified by humanitarian claims — still involves physical destruction and civilian casualties

Legal anchor: Geneva Conventions / UN Charter

Severity: CRITICAL VIOLATION · Confidence: 88% · Language: EN · Confirmed 29 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: HIGH CONCERN: "redundancies"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “redundancies”

Physical reality: Job losses — physical persons stripped of income and workplace

Legal anchor: UDHR Art. 23 — Right to Work

Severity: HIGH CONCERN · Confidence: 88% · Language: EN · Confirmed 36 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: HIGH CONCERN: "administrative removal"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “administrative removal”

Physical reality: Forced deportation of physical persons — removal from country using bureaucratic framing

Legal anchor: UDHR Art. 13 — Freedom of Movement

Severity: HIGH CONCERN · Confidence: 88% · Language: EN · Confirmed 33 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: HIGH CONCERN: "fiscal consolidation"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “fiscal consolidation”

Physical reality: Government spending cuts reducing physical access to healthcare, housing and food for vulnerable populations

Legal anchor: UDHR Art. 25 / UN Charter Art. 55

Severity: HIGH CONCERN · Confidence: 87% · Language: EN · Confirmed 28 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: CRITICAL VIOLATION: "regime change"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “regime change”

Physical reality: Forcible replacement of a government — typically involving physical violence and civilian displacement

Legal anchor: UN Charter Art. 2(4) — Non-interference in Sovereign States / Rome Statute

Severity: CRITICAL VIOLATION · Confidence: 86% · Language: EN · Confirmed 25 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools

item.title: HIGH CONCERN: "carbon offsetting"
item.description:
Institutional phrase: “carbon offsetting”

Physical reality: Financial mechanism that permits continued pollution by purchasing credits rather than reducing physical emissions

Legal anchor: Paris Agreement / Ecocide Framework

Severity: HIGH CONCERN · Confidence: 85% · Language: EN · Confirmed 24 time(s).

Verified via decentralised human-in-the-loop consensus. unmask.tools
